headline: A Look At Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) Valuation As Infrastructure Spending Supports Demand
summary: Infrastructure spending sets the tone for Martin Marietta Materials Fresh commentary on federal and state spending for highways, utilities, and broader infrastructure projects has put Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) back in focus for investors watching construction end markets. Resilient private nonresidential activity and infrastructure funding contrast with weaker residential construction tied to higher interest rates, while disciplined pricing, operational execution, and portfolio moves...
